execution.notes: Plan reports are read-only. Applying migration changes requires explicit operator approval and target-repo verification.

pre.description: Capture target repo working-tree state before applying a reviewed migration.
Generate a fresh repo upgrade plan immediately before mutation.

post.description: Run the target repo verifier after reviewed migration changes are applied.
Record the applied migration id and verification evidence in .repo-kit/migration_answers.json.

migrations.title: Install declarative repo consistency policy
migrations.description: Move hardcoded repo consistency expectations into managed policy files while preserving downstream local overlays.

changes.description: Install the policy schema used by review tools.

manual_review: Confirm downstream consistency checks still match the repo type before marking the migration applied.

migrations.title: Install standards migration manifest and replay answers contract
migrations.description: Add the neutral migration manifest and local-owned answer replay file so future standards updates can be planned without manual file-by-file audit.

changes.description: Install the managed standards migration manifest.
Create missing answer replay file or preserve existing local decisions.

manual_review: Do not overwrite an existing .repo-kit/migration_answers.json file without explicit operator review.
Keep false or deferred answers as manual-review blockers instead of converting them to applied state.

migrations.title: Adopt Codex/memory-bank as default agent surface
migrations.description: Demote Cline from default repo infrastructure to an optional compatibility pack while preserving explicit downstream choices.

changes.description: Install the updated agent-surface policy that makes Cline optional.
Install the machine-readable default/optional agent surface contract.
Record whether the downstream repo opts into optional Cline assets.

manual_review: If the repo actively uses Cline, rerun install_repo_standards.ps1 with -IncludeCline and record include_optional_cline_pack=true.
If existing Cline files are present but no longer used, preserve them until a separate removal/archive wave is approved.
Do not delete .clineignore, .clinerules, docs/CLINE_GUIDE.md, or docs/CLINE_TASK_CURRENT.md from downstream repos as part of the default standards install.
